title: RankTiers
description: RankTiers show your tier from the official RankTiers Website
body:
RankTiers is a high-performance, client-side cosmetic utility designed to bring visual hierarchy to your Minecraft experience. Whether you’re part of a competitive PvP community, a tiered ranking system, or a private SMP, RankTiers allows you to seamlessly display custom rank prefixes next to player usernames.

🚀 Key Features
Dynamic Tier Tags: Display custom rankings (e.g., Tier 1, Elite, Champion) directly in player nameplates and the Tab list.

Complete Visual Control: Fully customize colors, formatting, and bracket styles to create a look that fits your community’s brand.

Zero-Lag Optimization: Built from the ground up for modern loaders (Fabric/Quilt), ensuring that your frames per second (FPS) stay high while your tags look sharp.

Global Compatibility: Designed to work across most multiplayer environments without needing any server-side files.

Easy Configuration: Manage your rank databases and local settings through simple, readable config files.

🛠️ How It Works
RankTiers functions by associating player UUIDs with specific rank data. Once configured, the mod automatically renders the designated prefix in real-time, allowing for instant recognition of skill levels or roles within any lobby.
